overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a small anthropomorphic character perched on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast grassland valley during golden hour. The character occasionally raises their hands to their face to observe the distant landscape while birds fly across the partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky outcrop overlooking vast grassland valley

events.description: character raises both hands to face, shielding eyes or looking into the distance
character raises hands to face again in an observing gesture
flock of birds flies across the sky from right to left

agents.ego_description: sitting on a rocky outcrop, surveying the vast landscape and occasionally raising hands to face to look into the distance

entered.detail: mossy granite boulder where the character is perched, occupying the right foreground
layered mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon under the clouds
cumulus clouds scattered across the blue sky catching golden hour light
dense green tree coverage filling the valley below the outcrop
rolling green prairie extending from the rock base to the distant mountains

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot shows a small anthropomorphic character sitting on a large mossy rock outcrop overlooking an expansive grassland valley during golden hour. The character occasionally raises their hands to their face to observe the landscape, while distant mountains and scattered clouds fill the background. Birds fly across the sky as the warm sunlight illuminates the dense forest canopy below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic perspective of a small anthropomorphic character perched on a mossy outcrop overlooking a vast, sun-drenched valley. It begins with the character sitting quietly against a backdrop of distant mountains and scattered clouds during the golden hour. As the character raises their hands to their face to observe the horizon, the warm sunlight emphasizes the depth of the expansive grassland. The scene then lingers on the surrounding environment, where birds glide across the sky above a dense, illuminated forest canopy.
